title: Integration to set the Last Activity date based off the End Date of the Activity. Instead of just setting to "today".
excerpt: I’m using the following Integration… When activity is created in Emails & Activities, set Last Interaction to today. I’d like this to have the ability to modify “today”. Our team would like this to set Last Interaction t…

posts.author: adowell (A. Dowell)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m using the following Integration… When activity is created in Emails & Activities, set Last Interaction to today. I’d like this to have the ability to modify “today”. Our team would like this to set Last Interaction to the End Date of the activity. I’m sure others would want additional options.
